meanings.definition: give instructions to or direct somebody to do something with authority
examples: I said to him to go home
She ordered him to do the shopping
The mother told the child to get dressed

meanings.definition: bring into conformity with rules or principles or usage; impose regulations
examples: We cannot regulate the way people dress
he was ordained in the Church
I put these memories with those of bygone times

meanings.definition: assign a rank or rating to
examples: how would you rank these students?
The restaurant is rated highly in the food guide

meanings.definition: having a systematic arrangement; especially having elements succeeding in order according to rule
disposed or placed in a particular kind of order
examples: comfortable chairs arranged around the fireplace

meanings.definition: marked by an orderly, logical, and aesthetically consistent relation of parts
